name: Why didn't you go on?
overview:
A Peruvian gay short that tells us about the love a boy feels for his best friend. What will happen? Will the friend be angry when he discovers the homosexuality of his partner?

The short is made by Colectivo 360 and was broadcast on its channel to commemorate Gay Pride. So it is appreciated the good gesture of him.

trailers.title: PQNS3: LA ÚTIMA TEMPORADA | TRÁILER OFICIAL (SERIE WEB LGBT)
PQNS3: BAILANDO CON LA MUERTE | TEASER TRAILER (SERIE WEB LGBT)
PQNS3 | ¿PARA SIEMPRE? | TEASER TERCERA TEMPORADA [SERIE WEB LGBT]
